text: The detected bridges align with history: of 8 known historical bridges, 7/8 span distinct clusters, 6/8 are loosely detected, and 2/8 survive the strict theta<=2 filter (Gromov-Hausdorff, Spectral<->Representation). Galois<->Covering is the strongest qualitative hit. (Zorn/Choice fails to span - it is used too pervasively to separate.)
